2606.08151.title: Decision-Aware Memory Cards: Counterfactual-Inspired Context Selection and Compression for Tool-Using LLM Agents
2606.08151.paper_summary: Tool-using LLM agents often fail not because relevant text is absent, but because decisive evidence is not selected, compressed, or surfaced at action time. We present CICL, a decision-aware context layer that turns instance evidence into a context graph, routes deterministic, Opus-assisted, Qwen, Codex/GPT-5.5, and Qwen-QLoRA judgments through a shared eight-field schema, scores units by action shift, outcome uplift, necessity, and negative-transfer risk, and packs high-utility evidence as typed memory cards for a budgeted agent. The design separates the measured decision signal from the judge model, so frontier annotation, local surrogates, and lightweight rankers can be compared under one auditable protocol. Empirically, CICL yields a concrete open-benchmark gain while exposing its limits. On 50 SWE-bench Verified file-retrieval instances, direct Qwen3.6-plus reranking of BM25 top-50 candidates raises hit@1 from 0.58 to 0.78 and MRR@10 from 0.634 to 0.790, with all 2,500 judgments parseable. Controlled diagnostics show action-criticality: at budget 120, CICL reaches F1 0.620 on v1 and 0.425 on v3, and removing the top-utility semantic v3 unit collapses F1 to 0.000. Supplementary checks add Qwen-QLoRA agreement over 710 candidates, a small 200-label real-code Opus-assisted signal, and a three-instance patch smoke validating retrieval-to-patch plumbing without claiming official SWE-bench success. RepoBench-R summaries still beat cards, and compact rankers do not yet replace the heuristic. CICL contributes a reproducible measurement and selection layer for decision-critical context, not an end-to-end coding-agent repair claim.
2606.08151.paper_summary_zh: 工具使用的 LLM 代理經常失敗，不是因為缺乏相關文本，而是因為在行動時未選擇、壓縮或顯示決定性證據。我們提出 CICL，一個決策感知的上下文層，將實例證據轉換為上下文圖，通過共享的八字段架構路由確定性、Opus 輔助的、Qwen、Codex/GPT-5.5 和 Qwen-QLoRA 判斷，根據行動轉移、結果提升、必要性和負轉移風險對單位進行評分，並將高效用證據打包為類型記憶卡以供預算代理使用。該設計將測量的決策信號與判斷模型分開，因此邊界註釋、本地替代品和輕量級排名器可以在一個可審計的協議下進行比較。實證結果顯示，CICL 在揭示其限制的同時，產生了具體的開放基準增益。在 50 個 SWE-bench 驗證的文件檢索實例中，對 BM25 前 50 名候選者進行直接的 Qwen3.6-plus 重新排名，將 hit@1 從 0.58 提升至 0.78，將 MRR@10 從 0.634 提升至 0.790，且所有 2,500 個判斷均可解析。受控診斷顯示行動關鍵性：在預算 120 下，CICL 在 v1 上達到 F1 0.620，在 v3 上達到 0.425，並且移除最高效用的語義 v3 單位使 F1 崩潰至 0.000。補充檢查增加了 Qwen-QLoRA 在 710 個候選者上的一致性、一個小型 200 標籤的實際代碼 Opus 輔助信號，以及三個實例的補丁煙霧測試，驗證了檢索到補丁的管道，而不聲稱官方的 SWE-bench 成功。RepoBench-R 摘要仍然超越卡片，緊湊的排名器尚未取代啟發式方法。CICL 為決策關鍵上下文提供了一個可重現的測量和選擇層，而不是一個端到端的編碼代理修復聲明。
2606.08151.author: Xinyu Guan et.al.
2606.08151.authors: Xinyu Guan, Qianyang Zhao, Yuming Deng
